scope_decision: User confirmed ALL FOUR TRACKS in v2.0 (2026-06-21).
summary: 8 OpenSpec changes emitted under umbrella v2-0-realtime-fabric-parity, dependency-ordered. Critical path: C1 (CRDT MergeStrategy port) unblocks C2 (AG-UI bridge) and C3 (Flint adapter) — the named headline priorities. Round 1 (parallel, no deps): C1, C4 (Tauri/SQLite), C5 (time-travel devtools), C7 (incremental spike, gated), C8 (eslint layering). Round 2: C2←C1, C3←C1, C6←C5. First change to apply: v2-crdt-merge-strategy-port (foundation). All integration libs ship as OPTIONAL peer deps (loro-crdt, @ag-ui/*, frf-sdk, @tauri-apps/plugin-sql) — core bundle stays zustand+immer. Every export-touching change (C1-C4) must run refresh:exports + verify:skills (CLAUDE.md immutable gate). C7 is the lone schedule risk: gated spike that may slip to v2.1 with a ceiling-doc floor deliverable.
